pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.5.5 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures and missing features required for the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against JDK 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode generation or build failures if strict checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with release flag for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern JDKs; using them with JDK 21 may cause warnings or incorrect module path handling.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate springdoc-openapi dependencies from v1 (springdoc-openapi-ui/security) to v2 (springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui).
pom.xml.why_exists: Springdoc v1 is incompatible with Spring Boot 3/Spring Framework 6; using it results in ClassNotFoundExceptions and runtime failures due to package restructuring.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update springdoc-openapi version property from 1.5.11 to 2.6.0 to match the new artifact structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 1.x artifacts do not exist in the 2.x line; using the old version with the new artifact ID would fail to resolve dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct and Lombok may conflict during compilation, leading to missing getter/setter methods in generated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update lombok-mapstruct-binding version from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 for compatibility with newer Lombok/MapStruct versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older binding versions may not support the API changes in newer Lombok or MapStruct releases, causing compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo Maven plugin version to 0.8.15-SNAPSHOT to support Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled with Java 21, leading to coverage report failures.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data method getOne with getReferenceById to align with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: The method getOne() was removed in Spring Data Commons 3.x (used by Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data JPA method getById with getReferenceById to comply with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: Compilation error: method getById(Long) is undefined for type CustomerRepository as it was removed in Spring Data JPA 3.x (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/errors/Gl.general_idea: Migrate validation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/errors/Gl.why_exists: Compilation error: package 'javax.validation' does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which runs on Jakarta EE 9+), causing compilation errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate servlet imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments used by Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with modern lambda-based HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compilation errors if the class extends it.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of antMatchers.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: The fluent API methods like .and(), .authorizeRequests(), and .antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6.0; code must use lambda DSL and .requestMatchers() to compile.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.
